gaps.description: PRD §1.5 grep streaming: grepStream implemented with readStream for single non-recursive files. Multi-file streaming added when readStream available. Recursive (-r) path still bypasses streaming and falls back to fs.read()/manual iteration.
PRD §5.4 Test coverage quality gate: coverage measurement exists and coverage is high, but CI-enforced quality gate thresholds (≥80% statement / ≥75% branch) are not yet configured.

PRD §5.3 Performance benchmarks: benchmark test cases exist in index.test.ts for grep <500ms (1MB), find <1s (1000 files), ls pagination <100ms. Pass with mock FS but no real filesystem benchmarks are configured.
